creator: doug.rand@dtn.com
text:
Created attachment 158023
Updated patch to bring victorops-nagios to version 1.3.16.

I took Brad Davis' patch and worked on it a bit.

This patch leaves some empty patch-* in the files directory that should be removed.

Needed to add coreutils dependency to get gtimeout added, and added the missing ca_root_nss dependency.
